author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Define safe remote access for printer APIs**

This introduces OctoPrint as a scriptable REST API, but the dossier never says how that API should be reachable once cameras and remote monitoring are added. Add a secure remote-access pattern—VPN/Tailscale/OctoEverywhere or an authenticated reverse proxy, plus Moonraker authorization/trusted-client boundaries—so the friend does not learn to port-forward a printer controller onto the internet ([OctoPrint safe remote access](https://octoprint.org/blog/2018/09/03/safe-remote-access/), [Moonraker authorization](https://moonraker.readthedocs.io/en/latest/external_api/authorization/)).

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
